injuries.comment: Gudas did not play in Tuesday's (Oct. 28) game against the Panthers.
The Ducks said on Friday (Oct. 31) that Granlund is expected to be out for 2-3 weeks.
Kreider did not play in Tuesday's (Oct. 28) game against the Panthers.
The Red Wings said on Sunday (Oct. 26) that Kane won't travel with the team to St. Louis but hopes to join them at some point on the road trip, per Ansar Khan of MLive.com.
